examples: And he did very abominably in following idols, according to all things as did the Amorites, whom the LORD cast out before the children of Israel.
If I said the only thing I can think of to say you would find it abominably commonplace.
Labour former Scottish Minister Lord Foulkes of Cumnock argued that the bill had been "treated abominably" by the government.
However, she said her daughter had been failed "abominably" by medical staff and said the experience had been "brutal".
